caller-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Lombok dependency version to a newer release compatible with the target environment.

person-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Lombok dependency version to a newer release compatible with Java 21.

person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.x and Java 21.
person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' error.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent dependency to version 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 support and modern Spring ecosystem standards.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with Spring Framework 6, causing runtime failures or missing features on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to ensure the project compiles and runs on JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compiling with Java 17 settings on a JDK 21 environment may result in incompatible bytecode or missing language features required by the new target platform.
